page: Microsoft Azure EC48ads_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECADSv5 family. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration includes 1843 GB of local storage and is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk attachments. It does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and substantial local storage capacity, the EC48ads_v5 offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads that require local scratch space without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware. This resource density makes the instance suitable for large-scale databases, memory-cached applications, enterprise resource planning systems, and data analytics workloads.
description: The Microsoft Azure EC48ads_v5 is a memory-optimized server instance from the ECADSv5 family, built on the x86_64 architecture with an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high resource ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. For storage-heavy operations, the instance is equipped with 1843 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. It does not include graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is engineered for memory-intensive and storage-dependent enterprise workloads, such as relational databases, in-memory caching systems, and large-scale data analytics, offering a balanced allocation of high-capacity memory and local storage resources.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC48ads_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 48 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and 1843 GB of local storage for demanding database and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC48ads_v5 is a memory-optimized server with 48 AMD vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 1843 GB local storage, built on Hyper-V.
tagline: An AMD-powered, memory-optimized virtual machine featuring forty-eight dedicated cores, high-capacity system memory, and substantial local storage.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor on x86_64 architecture
384.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
1843 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Virtualization managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor
Optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics
